notes.text: Mobile (touch/small screens): swipe left/right is the only navigation; on-screen arrow buttons are hidden. Desktop: arrow buttons visible (plus keyboard). So arrows are desktop-only, swipe is mobile-only.
Refactor the two identical GalleryGrid copies (foodphotography + propertyphotography) into ONE shared component rather than editing both copies. Both pages will import the shared component.

Where should the shared GalleryGrid live (e.g. app/components/GalleryGrid.tsx) and is galleryColumns.ts also duplicated across both sections (should it be shared too)? Verify all consumers before refactor.

payload.context: Discuss: mobile arrows + code structure decisions
